office_does: The clerk maintains Superior Court records, processes filings, and administers court-related financial and public services.
race_blurb: Serving clerk Jenn Biggar faces Andrea Jester, whose approved dossier contains filing-level information only.

candidates.summary: Jester is a filed candidate without an identity-safe professional biography or detailed platform in the approved dossier.
highlights: Official election material verifies her candidacy [S1].

candidates.summary: Biggar is the serving Douglas County clerk seeking a full term.
highlights: Directly administers the county clerk's office [S2].

experience.basis: Current administration of the clerk's office supports a proven-record profile, though tenure is not established.
